creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Thu May 23 01:46:47 2013
New Revision: 318811
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318811

Log:
  - Update to 1.0.0
  
  PR:		ports/178605
  Submitted by:	Garrett Wollman <wollman@csail.mit.edu>

Deleted:
  head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-021ea39f8e
  head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-lenses__puppet.aug
  head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-lenses__puppetfileserver.aug
  head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-lenses__sysctl.aug
  head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-src-augeas.c
  head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-src-augrun.c
Modified:
  head/textproc/augeas/Makefile
  head/textproc/augeas/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug   (contents, props changed)
  head/textproc/augeas/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/textproc/augeas/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/augeas/Makefile	Thu May 23 01:44:30 2013	(r318810)
+++ head/textproc/augeas/Makefile	Thu May 23 01:46:47 2013	(r318811)
@@ -7,10 +7,10 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	augeas
-PORTVERSION=	0.10.0
-PORTREVISION=	5
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.0
+#PORTREVISION=	0
 CATEGORIES=	textproc
-MASTER_SITES=	http://augeas.net/download/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://download.augeas.net/
 
 MAINTAINER=	swills@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	A configuration editing tool

Modified: head/textproc/augeas/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/augeas/distinfo	Thu May 23 01:44:30 2013	(r318810)
+++ head/textproc/augeas/distinfo	Thu May 23 01:46:47 2013	(r318811)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (augeas-0.10.0.tar.gz) = ec111af06186216930176ebe5ecccdf7bf528528aee9acde1d5d70088484afca
-SIZE (augeas-0.10.0.tar.gz) = 1676906
+SHA256 (augeas-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 31bf757c5b8197765946b3805f3793c32b03cd92a7a77ec95d37e71a1f131912
+SIZE (augeas-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 1880630

Modified: head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug	Thu May 23 01:44:30 2013	(r318810)
+++ head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug	Thu May 23 01:46:47 2013	(r318811)
@@ -1,12 +1,29 @@
---- lenses/shellvars.aug.orig	2011-11-28 18:51:05.000000000 -0500
-+++ lenses/shellvars.aug	2012-05-02 21:42:02.878164637 -0400
-@@ -196,6 +196,9 @@
+--- lenses/shellvars.aug.orig	2012-12-17 16:39:45.000000000 -0500
++++ lenses/shellvars.aug	2013-05-13 19:34:17.538347901 -0400
+@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@
+   let eol = del (/[ \t]+|[ \t]*[;\n]/ . empty_part_re*) "\n"
+   let semicol_eol = del (/[ \t]*[;\n]/ . empty_part_re*) "\n"
+ 
+-  let key_re = /[A-Za-z0-9_]+(\[[0-9]+\])?/ - "unset" - "export"
++  let key_re = /[A-Za-z0-9_.]+(\[[0-9]+\])?/ - "unset" - "export"
+   let matching_re = "${!" . key_re . /[\*@]\}/
+   let eq = Util.del_str "="
+ 
+@@ -201,7 +201,8 @@
+   let filter_default = incl "/etc/default/*"
+                      . excl "/etc/default/grub_installdevice*"
+                      . excl "/etc/default/whoopsie"
+-  let filter_misc    = incl "/etc/arno-iptables-firewall/debconf.cfg"
++  let filter_misc    = incl "/boot/loader.conf"
++                     . incl "/etc/arno-iptables-firewall/debconf.cfg"
                       . incl "/etc/cron-apt/config"
                       . incl "/etc/environment"
                       . incl "/etc/blkid.conf"
-+                     . incl "/etc/rc.conf"
+@@ -213,6 +214,7 @@
+                      . incl "/etc/lintianrc"
+                      . incl "/etc/lsb-release"
+                      . incl "/etc/os-release"
 +                     . incl "/etc/periodic.conf"
-+                     . incl "/boot/loader.conf"
- 
-   let filter = filter_sysconfig
-              . filter_ifcfg
+                      . incl "/etc/popularity-contest.conf"
+                      . incl "/etc/rc.conf"
+                      . incl "/etc/selinux/config"
